keyPoints: Use CDH to install and configure Hadoop cluster
HUE allows users to interact with Hadoop cluster and perform data analysis
Use HUE to load and process sample datasets
CDH includes Hadoop, MapReduce, and Pig
HUE provides a user-friendly interface for data analysis and reporting
Use HUE to generate reports and visualizations for sample datasets
CDH and HUE are used to analyze and generate reports for sample datasets
CDH and HUE are used for data analysis and reporting in big data analytics
CDH and HUE provide a comprehensive platform for big data analytics and reporting
